description:
This quiz tests fundamental SQL query skills, targeting developers who rely on ORMs and need to sharpen their raw SQL abilities. It has a playful, encouraging tone and is of moderate difficulty, covering core concepts like SELECT, JOINs, and filtering.
Topics: SQL query fundamentals, SELECT statements, JOINs, WHERE clauses, GROUP BY
Audience: Software developers and backend engineers who use ORMs and want to refresh their SQL skills
